scope: Cycle 10: Bug hunt C9 (encounter_card_overlay race condition) + WalkHUD enhancements

bugs_found.description: Race condition: player can press choice button while ogham activation is awaiting store.dispatch(). If card resolves and queue_free() runs before dispatch returns, ogham handler accesses freed nodes causing crash.
bugs_found.fix: Added _locked bool guard checked at top of both _on_ogham_pressed and _on_choice. All buttons disabled during async operations. is_inside_tree() check after await prevents accessing freed nodes.

overall_assessment: Cycle 10: 1 HIGH bug fixed (race condition). WalkHUD enhanced with 3 new features (card counter, life flash, faction indicators). 26 total bugs fixed across 10 cycles.
